input.brief:
Event invitation email for our annual tech conference 'DevSummit 2025'. Hero: full-width background image (600x400) with event title, date, location overlaid. Use VML for bulletproof background image in Outlook:
<!--[if gte mso 9]>
<v:rect xmlns:v="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:vml" fill="true" stroke="false" style="width:600px;height:400px;">
<v:fill type="frame" src="hero-bg.jpg" />
<v:textbox inset="0,0,0,0">
<![endif]-->
Below hero: 2x2 grid of speaker cards with headshot, name, title, topic. Primary CTA: 'Register Now' — must be a VML roundrect button for Outlook:
<!--[if mso]>
<v:roundrect xmlns:v="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:vml" href="https://example.com/register" style="height:44px;v-text-anchor:middle;width:200px;" arcsize="10%" strokecolor="#FF6B35" fillcolor="#FF6B35">
<w:anchorlock/>
<center style="color:#ffffff;font-family:Arial;font-size:16px;">Register Now</center>
</v:roundrect>
<![endif]-->
Include xmlns:v and xmlns:o namespaces on html tag.

output.html:
Mock Email Content

This is a mock email generated for eval pipeline testing.

expected_challenges: proper nested table grid for speakers

input.brief:
Order confirmation email. Structure: 1) Logo + order number header 2) Shipping address block 3) Order items table with columns: item image (60x60), name, qty, price 4) Subtotal/shipping/tax/total summary aligned right 5) Shipping tracking CTA 6) Help/returns footer. Use role=presentation on all layout tables. Use mso-line-height-rule:exactly on all tds. Ensure DPI scaling fix for Outlook:
<!--[if gte mso 9]>
<xml>
<o:OfficeDocumentSettings>
<o:AllowPNG/>
<o:PixelsPerInch>96</o:PixelsPerInch>
</o:OfficeDocumentSettings>
</xml>
<![endif]-->

The Fashion Team
